block_00: We are happy to announce that the IB dashboard is live!
block_01: Please note that in order to log in to your account, you need to use the new page,
block_03: . Enter your current credentials to log in.
block_07: After every trade is closed, your profit is credited to pending profit. After 7 days, the profit held is transferred to your balance. We still calculate profit for each trader separately.
block_08: You keep getting up to 45% of broker’s profit.
block_10: Now you can track each trade or your traders and calculate your profit.
block_11: Thank you for being a part of our Introducing Broker family.
